title: diplostephium pulchrum
intro: Diplostephium pulchrum is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family, native to the Andes mountains in South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Diplostephium pulchrum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil, which can be used topically or taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
